_meta.description: Spreadsheet semantics ontology: KPI definitions, units, currency rules, time periods, reconciliation hints, and column-role inference heuristics.

kpiDefinitions.formula: SUM(contract_value) for new and renewal deals

en: earnings before interest taxes depreciation amortization

name.pt: Valor do Tempo de Vida do Cliente

unitRules.conversionNote: Divide by 100 if raw number exceeds 1 and context expects a ratio
Default currency for en-US locale
Decimal comma in most European locales; decimal dot in en contexts
Brazilian format uses period for thousands separator and comma for decimal
Uses dot decimal separator
No decimal places; yen is a whole-number currency
Whole number count of discrete items
Multiply by 1,000 to get actual value when header indicates thousands
Multiply by 1,000,000 to get actual value when header indicates millions
Multiply by 1,000,000,000 to get actual value when header indicates billions
1 basis point = 0.01%; divide by 10,000 to convert to a decimal ratio
Expressed as a factor, e.g. 2.5x means 2.5 times
Dimensionless numeric ratio; do not add % unless explicitly a percentage
Whole number of calendar or business days
Can be fractional; 1.5 months = 45 days approximately
Can be fractional for CAGR or payback calculations
Can be fractional; used for labor tracking and cycle time
Whole number of people; FTE may be fractional
Discrete count of completed transactions
Rate expressed as quantity divided by a time period

timePeriodRules.computeHint: Use current date
Current date minus 1 day
Monday through Sunday of the current week
Monday through Sunday of the prior week
First to last day of the current calendar month
First to last day of the previous calendar month
Use current date to determine quarter boundaries (Q1=Jan-Mar, Q2=Apr-Jun, Q3=Jul-Sep, Q4=Oct-Dec)
Use current date to determine quarter, then subtract 1
January 1 through December 31 of the current calendar year
January 1 through December 31 of the previous calendar year
January 1 of the current year through the current date
First day of the current month through the current date
First day of the current quarter through the current date
Monday of the current week through the current date
Current date minus 12 months through the current date
Synonym for TTM: current date minus 12 months through the current date
Current date minus 7 days through the current date (inclusive)
Current date minus 30 days through the current date (inclusive)
Current date minus 90 days through the current date (inclusive)
Depends on company fiscal year start; common starts are Jan, Apr, Jul, or Oct. Requires context to resolve.
January 1 through June 30 of the applicable year
July 1 through December 31 of the applicable year
January 1 through March 31 of the applicable year (calendar year convention)
April 1 through June 30 of the applicable year (calendar year convention)
July 1 through September 30 of the applicable year (calendar year convention)
October 1 through December 31 of the applicable year (calendar year convention)
Replace N with the numeric argument; current date minus N days through current date
Replace N with the numeric argument; current date minus N months through current date
Same date range shifted back exactly one calendar year for comparison
Most recent weekday (Mon-Fri); skip weekends and optionally holidays
Last calendar day of the relevant month; handles 28/29/30/31 day months
January 1 of the applicable year; used as anchor for YTD calculations

description.en: Total assets must equal total liabilities plus equity
description.pt: Ativo total deve ser igual ao passivo total mais patrimonio liquido

description.en: Total debits must equal total credits in the trial balance
description.pt: Total de debitos deve ser igual ao total de creditos no balancete

reconciliationHints.rule: Beginning Cash + Net Cash Flow = Ending Cash

description.en: Opening cash balance plus net cash flow from all activities must equal closing cash balance
description.pt: Saldo inicial de caixa mais fluxo de caixa liquido de todas as atividades deve ser igual ao saldo final

description.en: Intercompany receivables must offset intercompany payables in consolidation
description.pt: Contas a receber intercompanhia devem compensar contas a pagar intercompanhia na consolidacao

reconciliationHints.rule: Book Balance + Adjustments = Bank Statement Balance

description.en: Adjusted book balance must match the bank statement balance after outstanding items
description.pt: Saldo contabil ajustado deve coincidir com o saldo do extrato bancario apos itens pendentes

description.en: Physical inventory count should reconcile with system records after adjustments
description.pt: Contagem fisica de estoque deve conciliar com registros do sistema apos ajustes

reconciliationHints.rule: Recognized Revenue = Billings - Change in Deferred Revenue

description.en: Recognized revenue equals billings minus the change in deferred revenue balance
description.pt: Receita reconhecida equivale ao faturamento menos a variacao no saldo de receita diferida

reconciliationHints.rule: Opening Deferred + New Billings - Recognized = Closing Deferred

description.en: Deferred revenue roll-forward must reconcile from opening to closing balance
description.pt: Movimentacao da receita diferida deve conciliar do saldo inicial ao saldo final

reconciliationHints.rule: Opening NBV - Depreciation + Additions - Disposals = Closing NBV

description.en: Net book value roll-forward must reconcile with depreciation and asset movements
description.pt: Movimentacao do valor contabil liquido deve conciliar com depreciacao e movimentacoes de ativos

reconciliationHints.rule: Tax Expense = Current Tax + Deferred Tax

description.en: Total income tax expense should equal the sum of current and deferred tax provisions
description.pt: Despesa total de imposto de renda deve ser igual a soma das provisoes de imposto corrente e diferido

reconciliationHints.rule: Translated Balance = Local Balance * Exchange Rate

description.en: Foreign currency balances multiplied by the applicable exchange rate must match translated balances
description.pt: Saldos em moeda estrangeira multiplicados pela taxa de cambio aplicavel devem coincidir com saldos convertidos

description.en: Consolidated figures must equal parent plus subsidiaries minus intercompany eliminations
description.pt: Valores consolidados devem ser iguais a controladora mais subsidiarias menos eliminacoes intercompanhia

reconciliationHints.rule: Opening Balance + Period Activity = Closing Balance

description.en: Any account's closing balance must equal its opening balance plus net activity in the period
description.pt: Saldo final de qualquer conta deve ser igual ao saldo inicial mais atividade liquida no periodo

description.en: Every journal entry must have equal debit and credit totals
description.pt: Cada lancamento contabil deve ter totais iguais de debito e credito

reconciliationHints.rule: Sub-ledger Total = General Ledger Control Account

description.en: Sub-ledger totals (AR, AP, inventory) must agree with the general ledger control accounts
description.pt: Totais dos razoes auxiliares (CR, CP, estoque) devem coincidir com as contas de controle do razao geral

reconciliationHints.rule: Opening RE + Net Income - Dividends = Closing RE

description.en: Retained earnings roll-forward must reconcile with net income and declared dividends
description.pt: Movimentacao de lucros acumulados deve conciliar com lucro liquido e dividendos declarados

signals: values match date formats (YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY)
values are numeric with optional currency symbols
limited distinct values relative to row count
values are text strings with mixed case
values contain spaces and are human-readable
values are non-negative integers or simple decimals
values are positive numbers with 2 decimal places
values between 0 and 100 or between 0 and 1
limited set of distinct values (USD, EUR, BRL, etc.)
values match phone number patterns with optional country code
values contain digits, spaces, dashes, or parentheses
values contain numbers followed by text
values are relatively long text with commas or line breaks
values suggest lifecycle states (active/inactive, open/closed, pending/approved)
values start with http://, https://, or www.
no currency symbols or percentage signs
values are decimal numbers typically between 0 and 1 or 0 and 100
values are numeric within a bounded range
values are sequential or nearly sequential
moderate cardinality relative to row count
values are alphanumeric with consistent length or pattern
all values are unique or near-unique
values follow a consistent pattern (e.g., INV-001, PO-2024-0001)
many cells are empty or contain free-form text
high average character length with high variance
values equal the sum of other numeric columns in the same row
positioned as the last numeric column or in a summary row
values are numeric and typically less than the total column
appears before tax or discount columns
values are numeric and proportional to subtotal
values are positive and smaller than the subtotal
values are numeric, often negative or shown as positive deductions
values are smaller than the subtotal
values are short text codes (kg, m, pcs, un)
values are numeric with varied magnitudes
header or context suggests a measured quantity

rule.en: Never infer column type from a single cell value
rule.pt: Nunca inferir tipo de coluna a partir de uma unica celula

dontInferRules.reason: Single values are unreliable; a number in one cell could be an ID, quantity, or currency amount

rule.en: Never assume currency from a symbol alone without locale context
rule.pt: Nunca assumir moeda apenas pelo simbolo sem contexto de localidade

dontInferRules.reason: The $ symbol is used by USD, CAD, AUD, MXN, and others; the yen symbol is shared with CNY

rule.en: Never infer a year from any 4-digit number without date context
rule.pt: Nunca inferir um ano a partir de qualquer numero de 4 digitos sem contexto de data

dontInferRules.reason: 4-digit numbers can be quantities, codes, prices, or IDs, not just years

rule.en: Never silently treat values over 100 as percentages without confirmation
rule.pt: Nunca tratar silenciosamente valores acima de 100 como percentuais sem confirmacao

dontInferRules.reason: Values above 100 may be raw numbers mislabeled as percentages, or growth rates that legitimately exceed 100%

rule.en: Never infer date format without at least 3 sample values
rule.pt: Nunca inferir formato de data sem pelo menos 3 valores de amostra

dontInferRules.reason: Date formats are ambiguous (01/02/03 could be MM/DD/YY, DD/MM/YY, or YY/MM/DD); multiple samples needed

rule.en: Never merge cells or columns without explicit user instruction
rule.pt: Nunca mesclar celulas ou colunas sem instrucao explicita do usuario

dontInferRules.reason: Merging is destructive and may lose data; always requires user confirmation

rule.en: Never assume the first row is the header without structural validation
rule.pt: Nunca assumir que a primeira linha e o cabecalho sem validacao estrutural

dontInferRules.reason: Spreadsheets may have title rows, blank rows, or metadata rows above the actual header

rule.en: Never infer whether higher or lower is better for an unknown metric
rule.pt: Nunca inferir se maior ou menor e melhor para uma metrica desconhecida

dontInferRules.reason: Direction depends on business context; cost vs revenue, churn vs retention have opposite semantics

rule.en: Never default to USD when no currency is specified
rule.pt: Nunca assumir USD como padrao quando nenhuma moeda e especificada

dontInferRules.reason: Currency assumption depends on user locale, document origin, and business context

rule.en: Never infer causal relationships from correlated columns
rule.pt: Nunca inferir relacoes causais a partir de colunas correlacionadas

dontInferRules.reason: Correlation does not imply causation; statistical relationships require domain validation

rule.en: Never extrapolate trends beyond the range of available data
rule.pt: Nunca extrapolar tendencias alem do intervalo dos dados disponiveis

dontInferRules.reason: Extrapolation assumes patterns continue unchanged, which is unreliable without domain justification

rule.en: Never assume calendar year when fiscal year might apply
rule.pt: Nunca assumir ano civil quando o ano fiscal pode ser aplicavel

dontInferRules.reason: Many companies use fiscal years starting in months other than January

rule.en: Never assume negative values represent losses without context
rule.pt: Nunca assumir que valores negativos representam prejuizo sem contexto

dontInferRules.reason: Negative values can represent credits, reversals, returns, adjustments, or sign conventions

rule.en: Never auto-fill missing values with zeros or averages without instruction
rule.pt: Nunca preencher automaticamente valores ausentes com zeros ou medias sem instrucao

dontInferRules.reason: Missing data may represent nulls, not-applicable, or not-yet-available; filling changes semantics

rule.en: Never assume time zone for timestamps without explicit information
rule.pt: Nunca assumir fuso horario para timestamps sem informacao explicita

dontInferRules.reason: Time zone assumptions can shift dates across day boundaries, affecting period-based calculations

rule.en: Never round numeric values without explicit user instruction
rule.pt: Nunca arredondar valores numericos sem instrucao explicita do usuario

dontInferRules.reason: Rounding can introduce material errors in financial calculations and reconciliations

rule.en: Never remove duplicate rows without explicit user instruction
rule.pt: Nunca remover linhas duplicadas sem instrucao explicita do usuario

dontInferRules.reason: Apparent duplicates may represent legitimate repeated transactions or entries

rule.en: Never reorder columns without explicit user instruction
rule.pt: Nunca reordenar colunas sem instrucao explicita do usuario

dontInferRules.reason: Column order may be significant for downstream processes, formulas, or user workflows

rule.en: Never infer parent-child hierarchy from indentation or naming patterns alone
rule.pt: Nunca inferir hierarquia pai-filho apenas a partir de indentacao ou padroes de nomenclatura

dontInferRules.reason: Visual indentation may be decorative; naming patterns may be coincidental

rule.en: Never assume the intent of a formula beyond its literal computation
rule.pt: Nunca assumir a intencao de uma formula alem de sua computacao literal

dontInferRules.reason: A SUM formula might be a subtotal, a total, a running balance, or a validation check

rule.en: Never assume number format locale without explicit signals
rule.pt: Nunca assumir localidade de formato numerico sem sinais explicitos

dontInferRules.reason: 1.234 means 1234 in pt-BR but 1.234 in en-US; misinterpretation changes values by 1000x

rule.en: Never assume data is clean, validated, or free of errors
rule.pt: Nunca assumir que os dados estao limpos, validados ou livres de erros

dontInferRules.reason: Real-world spreadsheets contain typos, mixed formats, merged cells, and manual entry errors
